agendaItems.title: File No. PS26-21127Resolution approving the Piggyback Agreement for Automated School Zone Enforcement Program between the City of Tampa and RedSpeed Florida, LLC for implementation of a School Zone Speed Photo Enforcement Program ("Program"); authorizing execution thereof by the Mayor of the City of Tampa and attestation by the City Clerk; providing an effective date. Memorandum from Chief Lee Bercaw, Tampa Police Department, transmitting additional information for said agenda item. (To be R/F)
